en: Now he's sent some notes to accompany the footage so I'll read
Hello all of you Hello Daddy
I can picture you all perfectly sitting there wishing it was Creature from the Black Lagoon
ko: 다들 거기 앉아서 블랙 라군의 괴물을 바랐을 거라는 거 상상이 돼

en: But instead this is just boring old me arriving
A hundred miles off the coast of Antarctica There's your Daddy
ko: 남극 해안에서 100마일. 저기 네 아빠가 있어

en: And nestled between the white bones of ancient whales
Here we've made some new friends and Mike was rather smitten He's got a beard Yes yes they're all
ko: 새 친구도 사귀었는데 마이크가 꽤 반했어. 수염이 있네. 네 네 다들

en: growing beards It makes him look a bit shifty No don't say that It makes him look like an explorer
ko: 수염을 기르고 있어. 좀 수상해 보여. 그런 말 하지 마. 탐험가처럼 보이는 거야

en: What's that Oh yes this is very funny
ko: 그게 뭐야? 아 네 이건 아주 웃겨
